text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! We're excited to have you join us as a moderator. Your verified status and helpful background make you a great fit. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! We're happy to have you join us as a member. Take your time to explore, and feel free to ask questions. Great to have you here!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! As a verified mentor, your guidance will be invaluable to our members. Thank you for joining us—we're lucky to have you!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! We're thrilled to have you as an event_helper. Your expertise will help make our events amazing. Looking forward to great things ahead!
